models.title: Get ready for the whisper-filled office of the future

models.title: Anthropic says ‘evil’ portrayals of AI were responsible for Claude’s blackmail attempts
models.summary: Fictional portrayals of artificial intelligence can have a real effect on AI models, according to Anthropic.
models.title_zh: Anthropic说，对人工智能的“邪恶”描绘是克劳德试图勒索的原因
models.summary_zh: 根据Anthropic的说法，对人工智能的虚构描绘可以对人工智能模型产生真正的影响。
models.title_en: Anthropic says ‘evil’ portrayals of AI were responsible for Claude’s blackmail attempts
models.summary_en: Fictional portrayals of artificial intelligence can have a real effect on AI models, according to Anthropic.

models.title: We’re feeling cynical about xAI’s big deal with Anthropic
models.summary: On the latest episode of the Equity podcast, we discussed what xAI's deal with Anthropic might mean for parent company SpaceX.
models.title_zh: 我们对xAI与Anthropic的重大交易感到愤世嫉俗
models.summary_zh: 在Equity播客的最新一集中，我们讨论了xAI与Anthropic的交易对母公司SpaceX可能意味着什么。
models.title_en: We’re feeling cynical about xAI’s big deal with Anthropic
models.summary_en: On the latest episode of the Equity podcast, we discussed what xAI's deal with Anthropic might mean for parent company SpaceX.

models.title: Voice AI in India is hard. Wispr Flow is betting on it anyway.
models.summary: Wispr Flow says growth accelerated in India after its Hinglish rollout, even as voice AI products continue to face challenges.
models.title_zh: 语音人工智能在印度很难。无论如何， Wispr Flow都在押注它。
models.summary_zh: Wispr Flow表示，在Hinglish推出后，印度的增长速度加快，尽管语音人工智能产品仍面临挑战。
models.title_en: Voice AI in India is hard. Wispr Flow is betting on it anyway.
models.summary_en: Wispr Flow says growth accelerated in India after its Hinglish rollout, even as voice AI products continue to face challenges.
